sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (x Float64, y Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) FROM test_data;
SELECT x, y, arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) AS regression FROM test_data GROUP BY x, y;
SELECT x, y, (k * x + b) AS predicted_y FROM (SELECT arrayReduce('simpleLinearRegression', x, y) AS (k, b) FROM test_data) AS params JOIN test_data;
